screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: This is the dashboard screen, designed to provide a high-level overview of active projects, open tasks, and team members in the user's workspace.

screens.name: Settings
screens.purpose: This is the Settings screen, which allows users to manage their workspace preferences such as notifications, security, and display options.

screens.name: Billing
screens.purpose: This is the Billing screen, which allows users to view their current subscription plan and upgrade it.
